product_name: Cognitive Firewall Instruments - authoring defensive instruments against AI-mediated analytic corruption
representative_input_captured: One claim cluster, source cluster, or method section from the research project.
operation_performed: Map the claim to evidence, identify method or scope limits, add counterargument handling, and produce a reviewer-facing section packet.
captured_output_record: A claim-evidence-method packet with source state, uncertainty boundary, and revision decision.

acceptance_results.evidence: One claim cluster, source cluster, or method section from the research project.
Map the claim to evidence, identify method or scope limits, add counterargument handling, and produce a reviewer-facing section packet.
The fixture fails if the project produces prose without claim-to-source support or if scope conditions are missing.
This proof fixture is a build instrument. It does not by itself prove final operational standing until executed and captured.
Requires human close reading or source-authenticity review before quotation, citation, or stronger source-use claims.

blocking_items_remaining: The package can capture claim-evidence-method structure, but publication readiness still requires full manuscript review and source verification.
claim_boundary_after_capture: May claim a package-level first capture exists. May not claim production deployment, external validation, or full operational standing.
